## Context
The codebase has auth infrastructure in two layers: `AuthService` (Payload-backed, `src/auth/auth-service.ts`) and service functions using `UserStore`/`SessionStore` (in `src/api/auth/login.ts` / `register.ts`). Neither layer is exposed as HTTP endpoints — no Next.js route handlers exist at `/api/auth/login` or `/api/auth/register`. These must be created.

## Approach

### Files to create

1. **`src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`** — `POST /api/auth/login`
2. **`src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts`** — `POST /api/auth/register`
3. **`src/app/api/auth/login/route.test.ts`** — unit tests
4. **`src/app/api/auth/register/route.test.ts`** — unit tests

### Design decisions
